title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Unacademy - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Unacademy - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Curriculum Developer looking for your next big career move? Unacademy in Nagpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Unacademy:
Unacademy is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Support students with special educational needs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Unacademy!
